function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Outbox reactive note was not applicable to this non-outbox finance write. Proceeding with second OCR migration.
next_step.observation: The invoice target file was updated with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body text.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested OCR workflow for both listed finance records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the two target files while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox processing workflow, loaded OCR + migration + schema docs, preserved original body text under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in /00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR two finance docs. Both target files contained all required schema fields and line items visible in their note bodies. Frontmatter added according to /99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md (invoice/bill required fields and lines) with no guessing, and original bodies were preserved verbatim per migration workflow. Cleanup step (deleting inbox file) was required by process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update after successful completion.
